data.title: Greenlane Holdings Appoints Jason Hitchcock as New CEO
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Greenlane Holdings ( (GNLN) ) has shared an announcement.

On February 11, 2026, Greenlane Holdings, Inc.’s board unanimously appointed Jason Hitchcock, a 40-year-old co-founder of decentralized finance advisory Four Moons and former business development leader at blockchain firm Nonfungible Labs (thirdweb), as its new chief executive officer, effective immediately. Hitchcock’s background in defi protocols, liquid token strategies and enterprise chain infrastructure, as well as prior strategic partnership work at livestreaming platform Twitch, signals a tilt toward digital asset and web3-oriented growth priorities for the company.

Under a new employment agreement, Hitchcock will receive a $300,000 annual base salary, an annual bonus opportunity targeted at 100% of salary and eligibility for standard executive benefits, aligning his incentives with performance. He will also be granted options to purchase up to 250,000 shares of common stock subject to customary vesting, alongside at-will employment, defined severance protections if terminated without cause or for good reason, and a standard indemnification agreement, collectively underscoring the board’s commitment to securing and retaining his leadership.

The most recent analyst rating on (GNLN) stock is a Sell with a $0.96 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Greenlane Holdings stock, see the GNLN Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GNLN is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (shrinking revenue, deep losses, and ongoing cash burn) and a strongly bearish technical setup (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Corporate events are somewhat positive but not enough to offset fundamental and trend deterioration, while valuation metrics provided are not meaningfully supportive.

To see Spark’s full report on GNLN stock, click here.

More about Greenlane Holdings

Greenlane Holdings, Inc. operates in the broader finance and technology ecosystem and is positioning its leadership with experience in decentralized finance, blockchain infrastructure and digital platforms. The company’s latest leadership choice indicates a strategic focus on leveraging defi, token-based strategies and enterprise developer tools to shape its future market approach and operational direction.

data.title: Adyton Drilling Extends High-Grade Gold and Points to Porphyry Potential at Feni Island
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Adyton Resources Corporation ( (TSE:ADY) ) is now available.

Adyton Resources reported successful drilling results from its 100%-owned Feni Island Gold-Copper Project in Papua New Guinea, confirming high-grade gold mineralization extending north of the current resource and identifying a new mineralized corridor. The work also includes step-out and twin drilling that improves confidence in resource continuity and supports potential upgrades from inferred to indicated categories.

Drilling to the south-southwest has revealed geological and geochemical vectors toward a deeper porphyry source at Danmagal, significantly enlarging the project’s prospective footprint and defining district-scale upside. Combined with new modelling and reprocessed geophysics, these results suggest the Kabang epithermal system may be linked to a larger porphyry system, potentially enhancing the project’s long-term growth profile and exploration pipeline for stakeholders.

More about Adyton Resources Corporation

Adyton Resources Corporation is a mineral exploration company focused on gold and copper projects, with its flagship Feni Island Gold-Copper Project in Papua New Guinea’s Lihir Island Chain. The company targets epithermal gold systems and potential underlying porphyry copper-gold deposits, aiming to expand and upgrade its resource base within a highly prospective district-scale setting.

Average Trading Volume: 912,472

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$102.6M

Learn more about ADY stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Apollo Silver Corp., a silver-focused explorer with key assets in California and Mexico, is positioning itself as a significant player in the critical minerals supply chain for U.S. energy, industrial and medical sectors. Led by an experienced management team, the company aims to deliver value through exploration and development of its large-scale silver and associated mineral deposits.

Apollo Silver has been ranked 13th overall in the 2026 TSX Venture 50, an annual ranking of the top-performing issuers on the TSX Venture Exchange based on market cap growth, share price appreciation and trading value. The recognition reflects a year of strong market performance, supported by substantial share price gains and the advancement of its Calico and Cinco de Mayo projects amid a constructive market for silver as a critical industrial mineral.

data.title: Allied Raises $560 Million in Equity to Refinance Debt and Bolster Balance Sheet
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Allied Properties Real Estate Investment Trust ( ($TSE:AP.UN) ).

Allied Properties Real Estate Investment Trust has closed a combined $560 million equity raise through a marketed public offering and a concurrent private placement of 56 million units priced at $10. The public component was underwritten by a major Canadian bank syndicate and sold across all provinces and territories, while Alberta Investment Management Corporation acquired 16 million units in the private placement subject to resale restrictions.

The REIT plans to use the net proceeds to repay amounts drawn on its operating line of credit, which it had used to retire $600 million of 1.726% series H senior unsecured debentures earlier in February. The transaction strengthens Allied’s balance sheet by replacing short-term credit with fresh equity capital, potentially improving its financial flexibility and supporting its positioning as a key provider of urban workspace in Canada’s major cities.

The most recent analyst rating on ($TSE:AP.UN) stock is a Sell with a C$9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Allied Properties Real Estate Investment Trust stock, see the TSE:AP.UN Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Torr Metals Confirms High-Grade Gold and Extends Filion Corridor Staking
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Torr Metals Inc ( (TSE:TMET) ) has issued an update.

Torr Metals Inc. reported high-grade gold assays of up to 13.1 g/t from 14 reconnaissance rock grab samples collected in 2025 at the Oscar Zone within its 202 km² Filion Gold Project in northern Ontario. The samples, taken from historical trenches largely untested by modern drilling, confirm the presence of a significant gold-bearing system and validate earlier soil anomalies with orogenic-style geochemical signatures.

To secure the broader potential of this system, the company has expanded its staking to cover the entire ~60 km strike length of the Filion structural corridor, of which only about 8% has been systematically explored to date. Integrated magnetic and VLF/EM geophysical data outline structural intersections and deformation breaks that define new high-priority drill targets, enhancing the project’s exploration upside and underscoring its strategic positioning in a well-serviced gold district.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:TMET) stock is a Hold with a C$0.14 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Torr Metals Inc stock, see the TSE:TMET Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:TMET Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:TMET is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak fundamentals (no revenue, significant losses, and ongoing cash burn) despite a debt-free balance sheet. Technical indicators are largely neutral/mixed and do not materially offset the fundamental risk. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:TMET stock, click here.

More about Torr Metals Inc

Torr Metals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on gold, advancing its 100%-owned Filion Gold Project in northern Ontario. The company is targeting a district-scale, 60-kilometre structural corridor in a prospective orogenic gold district, leveraging modern geophysics, soil geochemistry, and accessible infrastructure near the Trans-Canada Highway for potential discovery and development.

data.title: Marvel Biosciences Wins NRC IRAP Support for Pediatric Liquid Form of Lead Neurodrug
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Marvel Biosciences Corp ( (TSE:MRVL) ) has issued an announcement.

Marvel Biosciences Corp. has secured advisory services and funding from Canada’s National Research Council Industrial Research Assistance Program to develop a pediatric-friendly liquid formulation of its lead compound, MB-204. The initiative targets children and adolescents with neurodevelopmental disorders such as autism spectrum disorder, Rett syndrome and Fragile X syndrome, who often struggle to swallow pills or rely on feeding tubes, limiting the use of conventional solid-dose medications.

The project will test multiple oral liquid approaches to produce a small-volume, stable and reproducible formulation that can be given via oral syringe or feeding tube without sacrificing drug exposure or consistency. By prioritizing child-appropriate dosing early, Marvel aims to improve treatment accessibility and adherence, ease the burden on families, support future pediatric clinical trials, and strengthen its intellectual property and position in patient-centric therapies while keeping high-value pharmaceutical R&D activity in Canada through local research partnerships.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MRVL) stock is a Sell with a C$0.14 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Marvel Biosciences Corp stock, see the TSE:MRVL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:MRVL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:MRVL is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses/cash burn, and negative equity). Technicals also remain bearish with the stock below major moving averages and negative MACD. A positive corporate event (substantial warrant exercises) provides some financing relief, but it is not enough to offset the core balance-sheet and cash-burn risks.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MRVL stock, click here.

More about Marvel Biosciences Corp

Marvel Biosciences Corp. is a Calgary-based biotechnology company focused on developing new treatments for neurological diseases and neurodevelopmental disorders. Its lead drug candidate, MB-204, is a novel fluorinated derivative of Istradefylline, an approved Parkinson’s therapy and the only adenosine A2A receptor blocker currently on the market, with potential applications in autism, depression, Alzheimer’s disease, Rett syndrome and Fragile X syndrome.

data.title: Highway 50 Gold Plans $1.5 Million Private Placement to Advance Nevada Exploration
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Highway 50 Gold ( (TSE:HWY) ) has issued an update.

Highway 50 Gold Corp. has launched a non-brokered private placement to raise up to $1.5 million through the issuance of up to 3.75 million units at $0.40 per unit, each comprising one common share and a one-year warrant exercisable at $0.50. The financing, which remains subject to TSX Venture Exchange acceptance and includes a four-month hold on issued securities, will fund a drill program at the company’s Gold Knob project and provide general working capital, with finder’s fees potentially payable to arm’s length intermediaries.

The placement signals the company’s intention to advance exploration at Gold Knob and underpins its broader Nevada-focused strategy, although completion is contingent on regulatory approval and market participation. For stakeholders, the raise represents potential equity dilution offset by the prospect of value creation through targeted drilling and further de-risking of Highway 50 Gold’s exploration portfolio.

More about Highway 50 Gold

Highway 50 Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration-stage company focused on projects in Nevada and led by a team of experienced explorers and mine finders. The company’s exploration strategy is based on what management views as breakthroughs in understanding the crustal architecture of north-central Nevada, guiding its targeting and project development efforts.

data.title: Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund Launches Preferred Stock Offering
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund L ( (TAKLX) ) has provided an update.

Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund is currently conducting a private offering of preferred stock to select institutional investors, aiming to raise additional capital to support its private credit investment activities. The fund notes that issuing preferred stock will increase leverage in its portfolio, which can magnify potential losses and entails greater effective leverage than the use of debt under the Investment Company Act of 1940, heightening risk for investors and signaling a more aggressive capital structure.

More about Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund L

Carlyle Tactical Private Credit Fund is an investment fund focused on private credit strategies, raising capital from institutional investors to build and manage a leveraged portfolio of credit assets. It operates under the Investment Company Act of 1940, which shapes how it can use instruments such as preferred stock and debt to enhance returns through leverage.

data.title: VCI Global Moves Into Execution Phase With Majority-Controlled RWA Digital Coupon Exchange
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from VCI Global Limited ( (VCIG) ).

On February 18, 2026, VCI Global said its blockchain arm Smart Bridge Technologies signed a definitive partnership agreement with Mezzofy Holding to build a Real-World Asset digital coupon exchange focused on tokenized vouchers. The structure gives Smart Bridge 51% control of the planned entity and regulatory and settlement leadership, while Mezzofy contributes its technology stack and multinational merchant network, aiming to plug into an existing enterprise ecosystem rather than rely on speculative retail demand.

The move marks a shift from development to commercial deployment in VCI Global’s digital asset strategy, positioning the exchange as a core infrastructure pillar expected to generate transaction fees, enterprise tokenization services and settlement revenues. By targeting the large but fragmented global digital voucher market and enabling secondary trading and price discovery for previously illiquid vouchers, the initiative could enhance VCI Global’s role as an early infrastructure provider in enterprise-focused digital commerce, though final capital commitments and the actual formation of the joint entity remain subject to further agreements and approvals.

data.title: G. Willi-Food Sets March 24, 2026 Special Meeting to Vote on Executive Role, Services Pact and New External Director
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Willi Food Inte ( (WILC) ) has shared an update.

G. Willi-Food International has called a Special General Meeting of shareholders for March 24, 2026 in Yavne, Israel, according to a Form 6-K filed on February 18, 2026. Shareholders of record as of February 24, 2026 will be eligible to participate and vote, either in person or by proxy, with a quorum set at 25% of outstanding ordinary shares.

On the agenda are three key governance matters: approval of the terms of office for Mrs. Karin Williger as head of business optimization and business development effective January 1, 2026, a three-year extension of the services agreement with controlling shareholder Willi-Food Investments Ltd. from January 1, 2026, and the election of Ms. Michal Fishler Mund as an external director for a three-year term starting June 1, 2026. These votes could shape the company’s leadership structure and its relationship with its controlling shareholder, with special approval thresholds applying to related-party and external director items under Israeli corporate law.

The most recent analyst rating on (WILC) stock is a Buy with a $33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Willi Food Inte stock, see the WILC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WILC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WILC is a Outperform.

Willi Food Inte’s strong financial performance and technical indicators are the primary drivers of its high score. The stock’s attractive valuation further supports its investment appeal. However, the lack of earnings call data and corporate events limits additional insights.

To see Spark’s full report on WILC stock, click here.

More about Willi Food Inte

G. Willi-Food International Ltd. is an Israeli food company that operates as a foreign private issuer on U.S. markets and files annual reports on Form 20-F. The company is controlled by Willi-Food Investments Ltd. and conducts its corporate governance and shareholder actions in accordance with Israeli Companies Law and international securities regulations.
